---
title: "Laktatutvikling 4mmol"
format: html
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}

library(tidyverse)
# Data
df <- tribble(
  ~FP, ~Tid, ~Laktat, ~Gruppe,
  1, 8, 4.05, "Fullforte",
  1, 16, 5.2,  "Fullforte",
  1, 24, 5.91, "Fullforte",
  1, 32, 6.01, "Fullforte",
  1, 40, 7.64, "Fullforte",
  1, 48, 7.11, "Fullforte",
  1, 56, 7.17, "Fullforte",
  1, 61, 6.65, "Fullforte",
  2, 8, 3.9,   "Avbrot",
  2, 16, 5.55, "Avbrot",
  2, 24, 7.34, "Avbrot",
  2, 32, 8.55, "Avbrot",
  2, 40, 11.6, "Avbrot",
  3, 8, 4.08,  "Fullforte",
  3, 16, 4.25, "Fullforte",
  3, 24, 4.62, "Fullforte",
  3, 32, 4.73, "Fullforte",
  3, 40, 5.23, "Fullforte",
  3, 48, 5.73, "Fullforte",
  3, 56, 6.07, "Fullforte",
  3, 61, 5.63, "Fullforte",
  4, 8, 3.45,  "Fullforte",
  4, 16, 4.21, "Fullforte",
  4, 24, 4.05, "Fullforte",
  4, 32, 5.22, "Fullforte",
  4, 40, 5.4,  "Fullforte",
  4, 48, 5.93, "Fullforte",
  4, 56, 5.89, "Fullforte",
  4, 61, 5.37, "Fullforte",
  5, 8, 3.37,  "Avbrot",
  5, 16, 5.1,  "Avbrot",
  5, 24, 5.22, "Avbrot",
  5, 32, 6.37, "Avbrot",
  6, 8, 3.37,  "Fullforte",
  6, 16, 3.35, "Fullforte",
  6, 24, 2.95, "Fullforte",
  6, 32, 3.2,  "Fullforte",
  6, 40, 3.8,  "Fullforte",
  6, 48, 3.39, "Fullforte",
  6, 56, 4.13, "Fullforte",
  6, 61, 3.18, "Fullforte",
  7, 8, 3.63,  "Avbrot",
  7, 16, 4.28, "Avbrot",
  7, 24, 5.36, "Avbrot",
  7, 32, 5.45, "Avbrot",
  8, 8, 2.14,  "Fullforte",
  8, 16, 2.41, "Fullforte",
  8, 24, 3.06, "Fullforte",
  8, 32, 2.66, "Fullforte",
  8, 40, 2.6,  "Fullforte",
  8, 48, 3.69, "Fullforte",
  8, 56, 3.88, "Fullforte",
  8, 61, 2.92, "Fullforte",
  9, 8, 4.05,  "Avbrot",
  9, 16, 4.88, "Avbrot",
  9, 24, 6.13, "Avbrot",
  10, 8, 3.97, "Avbrot",
  10, 16, 4.82,"Avbrot",
  10, 24, 5.19,"Avbrot",
  10, 32, 5.67,"Avbrot",
  10, 40, 5.78,"Avbrot",
  11, 8, 4.06, "Fullforte",
  11, 16, 4.43,"Fullforte",
  11, 24, 5.54,"Fullforte",
  11, 32, 4.62,"Fullforte",
  11, 40, 5.63,"Fullforte",
  11, 48, 5.94,"Fullforte",
  11, 56, 5.9, "Fullforte",
  11, 61, 5.86, "Fullforte",
  12, 8, 4.56, "Avbrot",
  12, 16, 6.03,"Avbrot",
  12, 24, 6.41,"Avbrot",
  13, 8, 3.92, "Fullforte",
  13, 16, 4.02,"Fullforte",
  13, 24, 4.85,"Fullforte",
  13, 32, 5.27,"Fullforte",
  13, 40, 4.53,"Fullforte",
  13, 48, 5.31,"Fullforte",
  13, 56, 5.14,"Fullforte",
  13, 61, 5.05, "Fullforte",
  14, 8, 2.48, "Fullforte",
  14, 16, 3.06,"Fullforte",
  14, 24, 2.23,"Fullforte",
  14, 32, 2.25,"Fullforte",
  14, 40, 2.92,"Fullforte",
  14, 48, 2.83,"Fullforte",
  14, 56, 4.88,"Fullforte",
  14, 61, 3.04, "Fullforte",
  15, 8, 3.93, "Fullforte",
  15, 16, 4.69,"Fullforte",
  15, 24, 4.91,"Fullforte",
  15, 32, 4.89,"Fullforte",
  15, 40, 4.67,"Fullforte",
  15, 48, 4.65,"Fullforte",
  15, 56, 4.63,"Fullforte",
  15, 61, 4.98, "Fullforte",
  16, 8, 3.24, "Fullforte",
  16, 16, 3.87,"Fullforte",
  16, 24, 3.93,"Fullforte",
  16, 32, 4.17,"Fullforte",
  16, 40, 4.98,"Fullforte",
  16, 48, 4.24,"Fullforte",
  16, 56, 3.39,"Fullforte",
  16, 61, 4.36, "Fullforte",
  17, 8, 3.61, "Fullforte",
  17, 16, 3.75,"Fullforte",
  17, 24, 4.21,"Fullforte",
  17, 32, 4.56,"Fullforte",
  17, 40, 4.74,"Fullforte",
  17, 48, 4.42,"Fullforte",
  17, 56, 4.14,"Fullforte",
  17, 61, 4.17, "Fullforte"
)
# Faktor
df$Gruppe <- factor(df$Gruppe, levels = c("Fullforte", "Avbrot"))
# Oppsummering
df_summary <- df %>%
  group_by(Gruppe, Tid) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_laktat = mean(Laktat, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_laktat   = sd(Laktat, na.rm = TRUE),
    n           = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
# N-verdier for avbr??t
df_n_avbrot <- df_summary %>%
  filter(Gruppe == "Avbrot") %>%
  mutate(y_pos = mean_laktat + sd_laktat + 0.7,
         label = paste0("n=", n))
# Signifikanstegn
df_signif <- df_summary %>%
  filter(Gruppe == "Avbrot", Tid %in% c(16, 24)) %>%
  mutate(y_pos = mean_laktat + sd_laktat + 1.5)
# Figur
ggplot(df_summary, aes(x = Tid, y = mean_laktat, color = Gruppe, group = Gruppe)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_laktat - sd_laktat,
                    ymax = mean_laktat + sd_laktat),
                width = 1.5, linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_text(data = df_n_avbrot,
            aes(x = Tid, y = y_pos, label = label),
            color = "#990000", size = 3.5, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = df_signif,
            aes(x = Tid, y = y_pos, label = "*"),
            color = "black", size = 6, show.legend = FALSE) +
  annotate("segment", x = 0, xend = 61, y = 0, yend = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Fullforte" = "#003366",  
                                "Avbrot" = "#990000"),
                     labels = c("Fullf\u00F8rte", "Avbr\u00F8t")) +   
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 8, 16, 24, 32, 40, 48, 56, 60, 61), 
                     labels = c("0", "8", "16", "24", "32", "40", "48", "56", "60", ""),
                     expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 14), breaks = seq(0, 14, by = 2), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 63), clip = "off") +
  labs(
    x = "Tid (min)",
    y = "Laktat (mmol\u00B7L\u207B\u00B9)",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14, base_family = "Arial") +
  theme(
    axis.line.x.bottom = element_blank(),
    axis.line.y.right = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y.right = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y.right = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 30, b = 10, l = 10)
  )

```


```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(effsize)

print(df_summary, n = 30)
df %>% distinct(FP, Gruppe) %>% count(Gruppe)
df %>% count(Gruppe, Tid)
df_stat <- df %>% filter(Tid %in% c(8, 16, 24))

# T-test og statistikk per tidspunkt
resultater <- df_stat %>%
  group_by(Tid) %>%
  summarise(
    n_fullf      = sum(Gruppe == "Fullforte"),
    n_avbr       = sum(Gruppe == "Avbrot"),
    mean_fullf   = mean(Laktat[Gruppe == "Fullforte"]),
    sd_fullf     = sd(Laktat[Gruppe == "Fullforte"]),
    mean_avbr    = mean(Laktat[Gruppe == "Avbrot"]),
    sd_avbr      = sd(Laktat[Gruppe == "Avbrot"]),
    diff         = mean_avbr - mean_fullf,
    t_stat       = t.test(Laktat ~ Gruppe, var.equal = FALSE)$statistic,
    df_welch     = t.test(Laktat ~ Gruppe, var.equal = FALSE)$parameter,
    p_value      = t.test(Laktat ~ Gruppe, var.equal = FALSE)$p.value,
    cohens_d     = cohen.d(Laktat ~ Gruppe, data = cur_data())$estimate,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Vise resultater
resultater %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(., 3))) %>%
  print(width = Inf)

# Laktat 1 min etter slutt
df_slutt <- data.frame(
  FP = c(1, 3, 4, 6, 8, 11, 13, 14, 15, 16, 17, 2, 5, 7, 9, 10, 12),
  Laktat_slutt = c(6.65, 5.63, 5.37, 3.18, 2.92, 5.86, 5.05, 3.04, 4.98, 4.36, 4.17,
                   10.39, 6.37, 5.30, 6.64, 5.85, 7.15),
  Gruppe = c(rep("Fullforte", 11), rep("Avbrot", 6))
)
df_slutt$Gruppe <- factor(df_slutt$Gruppe, levels = c("Fullforte", "Avbrot"))

# T-test og effektst??rrelse for laktat 1 min etter slutt
t_slutt <- t.test(Laktat_slutt ~ Gruppe, data = df_slutt, var.equal = FALSE)
d_slutt <- cohen.d(Laktat_slutt ~ Gruppe, data = df_slutt)

cat("\n--- Laktat 1 min etter slutt ---\n")
cat(sprintf("Fullforte: %.2f +- %.2f mmol/L (n = 11)\n",
            mean(df_slutt$Laktat_slutt[df_slutt$Gruppe == "Fullforte"]),
            sd(df_slutt$Laktat_slutt[df_slutt$Gruppe == "Fullforte"])))
cat(sprintf("Avbrot:    %.2f +- %.2f mmol/L (n = 6)\n",
            mean(df_slutt$Laktat_slutt[df_slutt$Gruppe == "Avbrot"]),
            sd(df_slutt$Laktat_slutt[df_slutt$Gruppe == "Avbrot"])))
cat(sprintf("t(%.2f) = %.2f, p = %.3f, d = %.2f\n",
            t_slutt$parameter,
            t_slutt$statistic,
            t_slutt$p.value,
            d_slutt$estimate))

```
